title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: We're hiring a Junior Frontend Developer at Atlassian. This is an exciting opportunity to join our open, team-focused, transparent team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 0-2 years years of experience and are passionate about Collaboration, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Build responsive and performant user interfaces using React and modern web technologies
Collaborate with product and design teams to translate mockups into functional code
Optimize application performance through code splitting and efficient rendering
Write unit and integration tests ensuring code quality and reliability
Implement analytics and monitoring to track user behavior and application health
Participate in code reviews and contribute to frontend best practices documentation

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field

benefits: Flexible work schedule and remote work options
Wellness programs and gym membership reimbursement
